GreetingConversation.title: Hello quick reply options
GreetingConversation.summary: Record of a received greeting and three concise reply options in different tones for immediate use.

ResponseOptions.context_note: Casual, immediate reply choices for a friendly chat.

usage_notes.usage_note: Invites a short update or small talk

Option.text: Hello nice to hear from you.

usage_notes.usage_note: Suitable for formal or semi-formal contacts
